items.name: quality-hooks

items.description: Strict RED->GREEN->REFACTOR test-driven development with enforcement. Never write production code before a failing test. Atomic commits per TDD cycle.

items.name: code-reviewer

items.name: brainstorming

items.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
items.description: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies.

items.name: executing-plans

items.name: finishing-a-development-branch
items.description: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work.

items.name: receiving-code-review
items.description: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions. Requires technical rigor and verification, not blind implementation.

items.name: requesting-code-review

items.name: systematic-debugging
items.description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes. Requires root cause investigation first.

items.name: test-driven-development
items.description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code. Enforces RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle.

items.name: using-git-worktrees
items.description: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans.

items.name: using-superpowers
items.description: Use when starting any conversation. Establishes how to find and use skills, requiring skill invocation before any response.

items.name: verification-before-completion
items.description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs. Evidence before assertions.

items.name: writing-plans
items.description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code. Creates bite-sized TDD implementation plans with dependency tracking.

items.name: writing-skills
items.description: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment.
